original_image_tags: Aged, yellowed paper document with three punch holes at the top (one with reinforcement tape). The top right corner is torn off, obscuring part of the date "October 8, 1954". The document shows typed text with multiple handwritten annotations in red and blue ink, several rubber stamps, and a distribution list in the bottom left corner. The paper has jagged, torn edges on the right side.

elements.description: Typed letter on yellowed paper with handwritten red annotations (numbers '62-83894-348', 'Complainant', and list of names), stamped markings, and a typed CC note at the bottom.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual elements (yellowed paper, red annotations, stamped markings, typed text), but Description A adds specific details (three punch holes, torn corner, blue ink, jagged edges) that Description B omits without contradiction.
